title: Giantree 4Pcs Mini Metal Cosmetic Spatulas, Makeup Spatulas Skincare Spatula Cream Spatula Reusable Beauty Accessories for Mixing and Sampling Plant Masks Skin Care Creams Eye Cream Essences
description:
【Package List】The package contains 4 pieces of mini stainless steel cosmetic spatulas, 3 shapes, the color is silver. The compact size of these cosmetic spatulas makes them easy to store in your bag for travel, or daily use, ensuring that you always have your favorite beauty tools on hand.
【Unique & Practical Shape】The shape of this makeup spatula is narrow at the top and narrow at the bottom, which fits the cheek very well and is easy to use. Spoon shape design makes it handy for you to dispense,dip or scoop out the face cream of jar, and filling container, offerring you optimum comfort. Less residual, no waste for you face cream.
【Easy to Clean】This stainless steel cosmetics spatula can be cleaned with water, and paper towels, or with wet wipes, making it easy to clean quickly. The makeup spatula can be reused after cleaning.
【Sturdy Material】Crafted from high-quality 304 stainless steel, this skincare spatula spoon set is sturdy and durable, with a smooth surface without barbs, and can be in direct contact with the skin, suitable for long-term use.
【Extensive Application】These facial tools are perfect for blending or applying botanical face creams, eye shadows, face and body creams, lotions, a variety of makeup and skin care products, making them a versatile addition to your beauty routine.
